## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Forca version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Installation type: [e.g. installer, portable, AppImage, dmg]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Include the contents of the Developer Tools console (View → Toggle Developer Tools) if relevant.
